info.name: gear-up-backend
info.description:
# GearUp API GearUp is a RESTful backend API for a Sports & Outdoor Gear Rental platform. ## Roles - Customer - Provider - Admin ## Authentication JWT Bearer Token Authorization Header Bearer ## Base URL Development [http://localhost:5000/api](http://localhost:5000/api) Production [StartFragmenthttps://gear-up-backend-5b6a.onrender.com/apiEndFragment
](https://your-render-url.onrender.com/api) ## Main Features - User Authentication - Role Based Authorization - Gear Management - Category Management - Rental Orders - Stripe Payment Integration - Reviews - Admin Dashboard ## Tech Stack - Node.js - Express.js - TypeScript - PostgreSQL - Prisma ORM - JWT Authentication - Stripe Payment ## Error Response Format \`\`\`json { "success": false, "message": "Error message", "errorDetails": {} }

request.description:
## Register User

Creates a new account for the GearUp platform.

Users can register as:

- CUSTOMER
    
- PROVIDER
    
- ADMIN
    

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | ✅ |
| email | string | ✅ |
| password | string | ✅ |
| role | CUSTOMER | PROVIDER | ADMIN | ✅ |

### Success Response

- User account created successfully.
    

### Possible Errors

- Email already exists
    
- Validation failed

## Login User

Authenticates a user using email and password.

Returns a JWT Access Token.

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| email | string | ✅ |
| password | string | ✅ |

### Success Response

Returns:

- Access Token
    
- User Information
    

### Possible Errors

- Invalid email
    
- Invalid password

## Current User

Returns the currently authenticated user's information.

### Authorization

Bearer Token Required

### Success Response

Returns logged in user information.

### Possible Errors

- Unauthorized
    
- Invalid Token

## Get All Categories

Returns all available sports and outdoor gear categories.

### Authorization

Not Required

### Success Response

Returns a list of categories.

Example Categories

- Camping
    
- Cycling
    
- Fitness
    
- Hiking
    
- Water Sports

## Get All Gear

Returns all available gear.

Supports filtering.

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Description |
| --- | --- |
| category | Filter by category |
| brand | Filter by brand |
| minPrice | Minimum price |
| maxPrice | Maximum price |
| available | true / false |

### Authorization

Not Required

request.description:
## Get Gear Details

Returns detailed information about a specific gear item.

### Authorization

Not Required

### URL Parameter

id

### Success Response

Returns complete gear information.

request.description:
## My Rental Orders

Returns all rental orders of the logged in customer.

### Authorization

Customer Token Required
